title: Student No. 1
subTitle: To fulfil his father's dreams, Aditya joins a law college, although his heart yearns to be an engineer. He tries to rehabilitate unruly students, while hiding his dark past.

title: Filler
subTitle: Watch promos, music, and fillers back to back from the movies or shows.

title: Aravindha Sametha Veera Raghava
subTitle: A young man sets out to avenge his father's death but soon realises that violence is not the key to his salvation. His life changes when he meets another man, who helps him rediscover himself.

title: Filler
subTitle: Watch promos, music, and fillers back to back from the movies or shows.

title: TWR Premdhara
subTitle: A religious leader sheds light on various biblical teachings and principles whilst encouraging the devotees to reflect on the same.

title: Bhakthi Samacharam
subTitle: Get to know about the various pilgrimage centres all throughout India, alongside their rich history and cultural significance.

title: Mukku Pudaka
subTitle: Abhiram, a widower with twin daughters, and Vasundhara, a divorced mother with a son, find a second chance at love and parenting while navigating emotional and family conflicts together.

title: Srikaram Subhakaram
subTitle: A renowned astrologer gives out daily horoscopes and predicts the outcomes and changes in an individual's life based on planetary positions.

title: Omkaram
subTitle: A renowned astrologer predicts the future of the people and offers remedies to viewers suffering from problems in their personal and professional lives.

title: Aarogyame Mahayogam
subTitle: The host interacts with an expert who shares insightful tips and suggestions with viewers on maintaining a healthy lifestyle using traditional Indian techniques.

title: Malliswari
subTitle: Bhavani Shankar, the caretaker of a young girl, Malliswari, plans to kill her and inherit the entire property before she becomes an adult at the age of 21.

title: Mukku Pudaka
subTitle: Avani, who works as a tour guide, does not wear a nose ring according to her lineage, but her future mother-in-law wants her to hold a fair, vow to the village deity and wear it on that day.

title: Ummadi Kutumbam
subTitle: Ananda Bhairavi, who is in search of a homely daughter-in-law, finds Saranya to be a perfect match. However, Saranya's younger sister's contrasting personality proves to be challenging for Ananda.

title: Deergha Sumangali Bhava
subTitle: Ahalya's romance with soldier Indra ends in tragedy. Fate intertwines her life with his brother Gowtham, promising new beginnings.

title: Gundamma Katha
subTitle: Geetha, constantly ridiculed for being overweight, is compelled to marry Ram due to unfortunate events, and strives to win his heart.

title: Kalavari Kodalu Kanaka Mahalakshmi
subTitle: A loving father seeks a marriage alliance for his beloved daughter but is rejected by his relatives. Soon, her wedding is fixed with a man who does not approve of her, leading her to face some issues.

title: Ennallo Vechina Hrudayam
subTitle: Tripura, a kind-hearted teacher, steps into the life of Bala, a former businessman left with brain damage after an accident, forming a bond that transforms their lives.

title: Gharana Mogudu
subTitle: Venkatesh learns that he is to inherit a business that his relatives plot to seize from him. However, while his aunt conspires to control him, he secretly plans her ruin.

title: Kongu Bangaram
subTitle: Kongu Bangaram

title: Prema Yuddham
subTitle: Reetu's conviction clashes with Raghav's fierceness in what is a marriage of obligation. Tethered to family conventions and a union of compromises, can they still find love?

title: Aata
subTitle: Aata

title: Nindu Noorella Saavasam
subTitle: When an Indian Armed Force Major's wife passes away, her spirit stays in the house till the time she feels the ideal person to take care of her children has not arrived.

title: Padamati Sandhya Ragam
subTitle: After her mother's loss, Aadhya, who is under the care of Janaki, her aunt, is despised by Janaki's family because of her modern habits. Janaki tries hard to keep Aadhya happy.

title: Lakshmi Nivasam
subTitle: Lakshmi and Srinivas are a happily married couple who want to build their dream house. However, they must first navigate through familial problems, generational conflicts and financial struggles.

title: Meghasandesham
subTitle: A fire accident separates Bhoomi and Gagan from their respective fathers. While Bhoomi yearns to reunite with her family, Gagan hates his father, believing he abandoned him.

title: Chamanthi
subTitle: Chamanthi moves to the city with her mother after finding work as a servant in a politician's house. However, her life takes a turn when she marries the politician's son.

title: Jayam
subTitle: Ganga commences rigorous training under Rudra, a former boxer, aiming to protect her mother. Together, they confront their pasts, discovering fortitude and profound affection.

title: Jagadhatri
subTitle: Kakoli threatens Dipen against disclosing any information. Meanwhile, Jagadhatri comforts Koushiki and promises to protect the Mukherjee House.

title: Auto Vijayashanthi
subTitle: Carrying the responsibilities of her family, Vijayashanti, a hardworking auto driver, comes across Chiranjeev who is neglected by his father.
